creator: madd@tecdigital.net
text:
This updates ports/security/checkpassword to version 0.90

Fix: PORTNAME=      checkpassword
-PORTVERSION=   0.81
+PORTVERSION=   0.90
 CATEGORIES=    security
-MASTER_SITES=  http://cr.yp.to/software/ \
+MASTER_SITES=  http://cr.yp.to/checkpwd/ \
                ${MASTER_SITE_LOCAL} \
                ${MASTER_SITE_PORTS_JP}
 MASTER_SITE_SUBDIR=    sada
